# 💬 Discussion Topic Title

## 📌 Abstract / Executive Summary
Provide a brief, high-level summary of what this discussion is about and what decisions or inputs are needed.

---

## 🎯 Goals & Scope
- What are the main objectives of this proposal?
- What is explicitly out of scope for this discussion?

---

## 💡 Details & Proposal
Elaborate on the topic, system designs, proposed code changes, or workflow improvements. Use charts, markdown lists, or code blocks to illustrate your points.

```typescript
// Insert code snippet if applicable
```

---

## ⚖️ Trade-offs & Open Questions
- **Option A vs Option B**: What are the pros and cons?
- **Open Questions**: What aspects are still undecided or need group feedback?
